title: Custom Quicklinks
description: Adds a customizable shortcut menu to the Iterable navigation bar for instant access to your most-used pages.
author: Colin Whelan

title: Persistent User Lookup Bar
description: Adds a global search interface to the Iterable navigation bar for quickly finding users by Email or User ID without leaving your current page.
author: Colin Whelan

title: Profile Editor
description: Enables direct editing of Iterable user profile fields directly from the UI without needing external API tools.
author: Colin Whelan
